---
title: "run_incremental_test.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\run_incremental_test.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.63
style_score: 3.43
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.53
---

## Intent
The `run_incremental_test.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on run_incremental. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_incremental. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `run_incremental`
